name: WCE wceaux.dll Access
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Thomas Patzke
SIGMA Title: WCE wceaux.dll Access
SIGMA Description: Detects wceaux.dll access while WCE pass-the-hash remote command execution on source host

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID" IN('4656', '4658', '4660', '4663')) AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\wceaux.dll' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY WCE wceaux.dll Access on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID" IN('4656', '4658', '4660', '4663')) AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\wceaux.dll' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.
